reviews.comment:
La gasolinera el trato muy cordial. No así en la cafetería donde te tratan mal, mal, mal, sin educación ninguna.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas station was very friendly. However, the cafeteria was extremely rude, with absolutely no manners.
